subject: Icibemba
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Peela ubukankala bwa Litilica yakulandafye na iyalembwa
topics: Muli uyu mutwe, abasambi balaishiba umulimo icisambililo ca litilica
cibomba, ico icaba mumbali shibili, mukulandafye na mukulemba.
Abasambi balaishiba intambi shabo na intambi shabantu bambi,
